author: lOrm
content: DUP of #376 (canonical, broader scope, still open). #376 covers the entire tool subsystem (String, bool) anti-pattern including every file cited here (tools/file/*, tools/plan_mode.rs, tools/worktree.rs, tools/cron.rs, tools/todo.rs) and mandates the same refactor. Closing as dup; tracking continues on #376.
